title: Multi-Source Sentiment Consensus Gate
summary: Add a consensus-gating layer to Decifer's trade execution that checks whether news sentiment (FinBERT/Claude), social sentiment (Reddit SVC), and any third signal (e.g. Finviz analyst sentiment or put/call ratio) all point in the same direction. Context Analytics (2025) showed Twitter vs. News correlation is near zero, and Stocktwits vs. News is similarly uncorrelated — meaning cross-source agreement is a genuine independent vote, not a correlated echo. Their 2025 live portfolio data shows the 'all sources' agreement subset returned +33% YTD. This is the cheapest-to-build, highest-impact layer because it uses signals already computed in the pipeline.
expected_impact: Practitioner evidence: long 'all sources agree' portfolio +33% YTD 2025, outperforming SPY by 16%; reduces false positives by requiring cross-source agreement before entry
